exception.exception_value:
duplicate locals name globals_core module_dict core D:\dev_workspace\mobile-services\A12Bypass-Py\gsmflow-a12-build-action\core core d:\dev_workspace\mobile-services\A12Bypass-Py\gsmflow-a12-build-action\core
The above information should be included in a bug report.

nuitka-compilation-report.exception:
Traceback (most recent call last): File "D:\dev_workspace\mobile-services\A12Bypass-Py\venv\Lib\site-packages
uitka\MainControl.py", line 1348, in main _main() File "D:\dev_workspace\mobile-services\A12Bypass-Py\venv\Lib\site-packages
uitka\MainControl.py", line 1169, in _main main_module = _createMainModule() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "D:\dev_workspace\mobile-services\A12Bypass-Py\venv\Lib\site-packages
uitka\MainControl.py", line 335, in _createMainModule optimizeModules(main_module.getOutputFilename()) File "D:\dev_workspace\mobile-services\A12Bypass-Py\venv\Lib\site-packages
uitka\optimizations\Optimization.py", line 382, in optimizeModules _optimizeModules(output_filename) File "D:\dev_workspace\mobile-services\A12Bypass-Py\venv\Lib\site-packages
uitka\optimizations\Optimization.py", line 358, in _optimizeModules finished = makeOptimizationPass() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "D:\dev_workspace\mobile-services\A12Bypass-Py\venv\Lib\site-packages
uitka\optimizations\Optimization.py", line 317, in makeOptimizationPass changed, micro_passes = optimizeModule(current_module) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "D:\dev_workspace\mobile-services\A12Bypass-Py\venv\Lib\site-packages
uitka\optimizations\Optimization.py", line 190, in optimizeModule return optimizeCompiledPythonModule(module) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "D:\dev_workspace\mobile-services\A12Bypass-Py\venv\Lib\site-packages
uitka\optimizations\Optimization.py", line 149, in optimizeCompiledPythonModule considerUsedModules(module=module, pass_count=pass_count) File "D:\dev_workspace\mobile-services\A12Bypass-Py\venv\Lib\site-packages
uitka\importing\Recursion.py", line 652, in considerUsedModules new_module = recurseTo( ^^^^^^^^^^ File "D:\dev_workspace\mobile-services\A12Bypass-Py\venv\Lib\site-packages
uitka\importing\Recursion.py", line 123, in recurseTo module = _recurseTo( ^^^^^^^^^^^ File "D:\dev_workspace\mobile-services\A12Bypass-Py\venv\Lib\site-packages
uitka\importing\Recursion.py", line 65, in _recurseTo module = Building.buildModule( ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "D:\dev_workspace\mobile-services\A12Bypass-Py\venv\Lib\site-packages
uitka	ree\Building.py", line 1456, in buildModule module = _createModule( ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "D:\dev_workspace\mobile-services\A12Bypass-Py\venv\Lib\site-packages
uitka	ree\Building.py", line 1120, in _createModule result = createNamespacePackage( ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "D:\dev_workspace\mobile-services\A12Bypass-Py\venv\Lib\site-packages
uitka	ree\ReformulationNamespacePackages.py", line 205, in createNamespacePackage package = CompiledPythonNamespacePackage( ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "D:\dev_workspace\mobile-services\A12Bypass-Py\venv\Lib\site-packages
uitka
odes\ModuleNodes.py", line 758, in __init__ CompiledPythonModule.__init__( File "D:\dev_workspace\mobile-services\A12Bypass-Py\venv\Lib\site-packages
uitka
odes\ModuleNodes.py", line 309, in __init__ self.locals_scope = getLocalsDictHandle( ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "D:\dev_workspace\mobile-services\A12Bypass-Py\venv\Lib\site-packages
uitka
odes\LocalsScopes.py", line 41, in getLocalsDictHandle raise NuitkaOptimizationError( nuitka.Errors.NuitkaOptimizationError: duplicate locals name globals_core module_dict core D:\dev_workspace\mobile-services\A12Bypass-Py\gsmflow-a12-build-action\core core d:\dev_workspace\mobile-services\A12Bypass-Py\gsmflow-a12-build-action\core
The above information should be included in a bug report.
